questionHtml:
An electron enters the space inside a current-carrying solenoid. The velocity of the electron is parallel to the solenoid’s axis. The electron is

A. slowed down.

B. speeded up.

C. undeflected.

D. deflected outwards.

meta.title: An electron enters the space inside a current-carrying solenoid. The velocity of the electron is parallel to the solenoid’s axis. The electron is A. slowed down. B. speeded up. C.
